news.headline: US economy: labor market solid, in balance
Inflation expected to gradually ease to 2%
Labor Market Remains Soft but Still Strong
Fed policy determined by incoming data
Businesses seeing decreased ability to implement price hikes
Economy and policy outlook remains highly uncertain
Better Situation Expected as Inflation Cools and Wages Rise
Inflation progress may continue uneven: experts
US Expects Inflation to Reach 2.25% by 2024
Unemployment rate expected to be between 4%-4.25% in the coming months
Neutral rate's current location is uncertain.
US GDP expected to reach 2.5% this year, possibility of exceeding forecasted growth
Job Market Unlikely to Contribute to Inflation Increase
Fed's Williams: Top Concern is Cyber Attack Risk
Interest rates will need to be lowered over time
Canopy Growth and Acreage update closing timeline. Dec. 2, 2024. TSX: WEED, NASDAQ: CGC, CSE: ACRG.A.U.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Canopy Growth Corporation (TSX: WEED) (NASDAQ: CGC) announced a partnership with Acreage Holdings, Inc. (CSE: ACRG.A.U, ACRG.B...). Canopy Growth, a prominent cannabis company, and Acreage, a leading player in the industry, will collaborate to leverage the benefits of cannabis in enhancing people's lives. This collaboration brings together two key players in the industry and has the potential to significantly impact the market.

news.headline: Global digital photo frame market to grow by $110.4 million (2024-2028), driven by AI and rising living standards.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology reveals that the global digital photo frame market is anticipated to witness a substantial expansion, with an estimated growth of USD 110.4 million expected between 2024 and 2028. The market is projected to exhibit a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 2.94% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Anne-Mette Elkjær Andersen joins Tannenbaum Helpern as partner in Corporate Practice Group, specializing in mergers and acquisitions.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Anne-Mette Elkjær Andersen joined Tannenbaum Helpern as a partner in the Corporate practice. Andersen, a skilled corporate attorney, specializes in cross-border and U.S. mergers and acquisitions. Tannenbaum Helpern welcomed Andersen to enhance its legal team and provide expertise in handling corporate matters efficiently.

news.headline: Hammond Power Solutions to pay $0.275 per share dividend on Dec. 20, 2024 to shareholders of record on Dec. 13.
news.summary: In Guelph, Ontario, as of December 2, 2024, the Board of Directors of Hammond Power Solutions Inc. (“HPS”) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.275 per Class A Subordinate Voting Share of HPS and $0.275 per Class B Common Share of HPS. This dividend will be payable on December 20, 2024, to shareholders recorded on December 13, 2024. The ex-dividend date is also on December 13, 2024. The company's stock symbol on the Toronto Stock Exchange is HPS.A.

news.headline: Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. raises quarterly dividend to $0.90 per share on common stock.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Worcester, Massachusetts, The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. (NYSE: THG) revealed that its board of directors has given the green light to a rise in the company's quarterly dividend to $0.90 per share on the currently issued and outstanding common stock. The dividend is set to be payable in December.

news.headline: Tractor Supply raises $1 million for FFA Future Leaders Scholarships, totaling $3 million in 3 years.
news.summary: A rural lifestyle retailer, Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), revealed it raised over $1 million for the Tractor Supply FFA Future Leaders Scholarship fund in Brentwood, Tenn. This marks a total of more than $3 million gathered through the annual fundraiser in the last three years. The scholarships benefit FFA students focusing on skilled trades and agriculture.

news.headline: Housing credits at play in Trump tax plans, with buzz about short extension to cuts.
Molecular Templates received Nasdaq deficiency notice for delayed quarterly report filing & bid price non-compliance. Plan due by Jan 24, 2025.
news.summary: Molecular Templates, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing targeted biologic therapeutics for cancer, received a deficiency notification letter from Nasdaq on Nov 25, 2024, for failing to timely file its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30, 2024. The company has until Jan 24, 2025, to submit a plan of compliance. Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) was cited in the notice. The company's Nasdaq stock symbol is MTEM.

news.headline: Antarctica Advisors assists in sale of Copeinca, leading fishmeal producer, to Cooke for undisclosed amount.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Lima, Peru, Antarctica Advisors International Corp served as a sell-side investment banking co-advisor to the shareholders of Corporacion Pesquera Inca S.A.C. ("Copeinca"). Copeinca is a prominent company in the seafood industry worldwide. Antarctica is known as a leading M&A advisory firm specializing in the seafood sector. This deal marks a significant transaction in the industry, reflecting the continued growth and activity in the global seafood market.

news.headline: Global XR market to surge by USD 1.04 trillion (2024-2028) due to sensor tech advancements, AI influences trends - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted how artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market dynamics. The global market for extended reality (XR) is projected to increase by an impressive USD 1.04 trillion between 2024 and 2028, as per findings by Technavio. This growth translates to a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of close to 56.45% during this period.

news.headline: Graybar appoints Bryant L. Summers as District Vice President in St. Louis on Dec. 2, 2024. A distributor of electrical, communications, and data networking products.
news.summary: In St. Louis on December 2, 2024, Graybar announced the appointment of Bryant L. Summers as District Vice President. Graybar is a prominent distributor of electrical, communications, and data networking products, offering supply chain management and logistics services. Summers will oversee operations in St. Louis, contributing to the company's growth and strategic direction.

news.headline: Allied REIT declares distribution of $0.15 per unit for Dec 2024, with annual plan of $1.80 per unit for 2025.
news.summary: Toronto, December 2, 2024 - Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust, traded as AP.UN on the TSX, shared updates on their distributions. The Trustees declared a $0.15 per unit distribution for December 2024, with payment set for January 15, 2025, for unitholders recorded as of December 31, 2024. Additionally, they confirmed the 2025 distribution plan, maintaining $0.15 per unit monthly ($1.80 per unit annually).

news.headline: Over 90% of patients in Ryan White HIV Program achieved viral suppression, says AHF.
news.summary: In Washington, a recent report reveals that over 90% of patients enrolled in the Ryan White HIV Program have achieved viral suppression. This significant milestone highlights the program's effectiveness in managing HIV, with a vast majority of patients benefiting from the treatment. This development underscores the importance of widespread access to such programs and their impact on public health.

news.headline: FSA Store® launches deadline tool to help consumers avoid forfeiting unused funds by Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Consumers now have the option to tailor their online healthcare shopping experience with a new deadline feature introduced by FSA Store®. This feature enables individuals to personalize their shopping based on their FSA budget and specific health requirements. FSA Store® is recognized as the primary online store specializing in the sale of FSA-eligible goods and services. The introduction of this feature aims to enhance the shopping experience for consumers by allowing them to optimize their purchases according to their FSA budget and personal health needs. This feature was launched on December 2, 2024, in Dallas.

news.headline: Toronto copywriting company adds experienced writer/journalist with 17 years of freelance experience to team. Operating since 2008.
news.summary: A Toronto-based copywriting agency, established in 2008, is introducing a seasoned local writer/journalist with 17 years of freelance copywriting background. This expansion was revealed in Toronto on December 2, 2024, via a PRNewswire-PRWeb press release.

news.headline: London composer Christian Mason wins 2025 Grawemeyer music award for innovative piece 'Invisible Threads' with 12 musicians.
news.summary: A recent innovative installation piece titled "Invisible Threads," crafted by a composer from London, has captured attention for its unique approach to blending space with sonic geography. The composition, which involves a spatially shifting ensemble of 12 musicians, challenges conventional norms of music experience. The piece was particularly noted for its ability to transform the traditional perception of music. The installation was showcased on December 2, 2024, in Louisville, Kentucky, where it received acclaim for its boundary-pushing creativity and spatial dynamics.

news.headline: OpsHub joins Atlassian Marketplace with popular connector-based integration listings, providing customers with extensive suite of solutions.
news.summary: OpsHub, a reputable company specializing in Intelligent Application Mesh Solutions and an official Atlassian Partner, recently launched its offerings on the Atlassian marketplace. The suite includes a wide range of connector-based integrations, providing users with an extensive selection of options. This move allows users to seamlessly access OpsHub's integration solutions across various platforms on the marketplace.

news.headline: Xtalks to host free webinars on various life science topics in December 2024. Exciting discussions on clinical trials, commercialization, food, medical devices, pharma manufacturing & supply chain, and regulations. Stay updated! TORONTO, Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: Xtalks will be hosting a series of free educational webinars covering various topics including clinical trials, commercialization & HEOR, food, medical device, pharma manufacturing & supply chain, and pharmaceutical regulation. The events are scheduled to take place in Toronto starting from December 2, 2024. Stay informed on key industry trends and developments through these upcoming sessions.

news.headline: Caring Transitions is expanding in Manteca, offering relocation and downsizing services. MANTECA, Calif., Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: In Manteca, California, Liana and Michael are making a significant impact by offering a variety of essential services to their community. These services include senior relocation, downsizing, cleanouts, and estate sales. The couple's business, Caring Transitions, is a prominent provider of senior relocation and transition services, with a reputation for excellence. As of December 2, 2024, the company is showing significant growth and increasing its reach within the community. This initiative is particularly important given the growing numbers of seniors in need of such support services.

news.headline: Super-Sod merges with Tri-Tex Grass to expand in Texas. Announcement made on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: A leading provider of premium sod and turfgrass products, Super-Sod, has recently partnered with Tri-Tex Grass to expand its operations into Texas. The collaboration, announced on December 2, 2024, involves Super-Sod joining forces with Tri-Tex Grass, a well-known turfgrass grower based in Granbury. This move signifies a significant step for Super-Sod in entering the Texas market and leveraging the expertise of Tri-Tex Grass. The partnership aims to combine the strengths of both companies to offer high-quality turfgrass solutions to customers in Texas.

news.headline: Platinum Pro Capital launches tokenized real estate project, The Pearl of East Marsh. NFL player involved.
news.summary: An NFL player has recently launched the groundbreaking tokenized real estate project known as the Pearl of East Marsh in Austin, Texas on December 2, 2024. Platinum Pro Capital, a respected private equity firm focusing on luxury real estate investments in coastal areas, unveiled this pioneering initiative. The project marks a significant step in the real estate world, blending traditional property investments with modern blockchain technology. Stay updated on this unique endeavor that is set to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: 2025 Kia models now available in Cape Girardeau, Missouri at Chris Auffenberg Family of Dealerships. Visit to buy.
news.summary: The Chris Auffenberg Family of Dealerships in Cape Girardeau, Missouri, is now offering the 2025 Kia vehicles for shoppers. The arrival of the new lineup has generated excitement at the dealership. Customers can check out the latest models and features from Kia for the upcoming year.

news.headline: CEO of Miami ad agency moderates ACHE panel on market share strategies. Daniel Weinbach to lead discussion. (Characters: 106)
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Daniel Weinbach, President and CEO of The Weinbach Group, a prominent healthcare marketing firm, will lead a panel discussion on strategies for gaining market share. The event will be hosted by the American College. Weinbach's leadership in this space makes him an ideal candidate for this conversation.

news.headline: Brown Medicine launches new Podiatry Division for foot and ankle care, catering to all ages. Specialties include sports medicine, diabetic care, neurology, and orthopedics.
news.summary: Brown Medicine recently unveiled the establishment of their Division of Podiatry, providing top-notch foot and ankle care for patients spanning all age groups. This newly introduced division boasts specialized services in various fields such as sports medicine, diabetic foot care, neurology, and orthopedics. This development is significant for the healthcare sector and highlights the institution's commitment to delivering comprehensive and advanced medical services.

news.headline: 2025 Mazda CX-5 now available in Rio Grande, Puerto Rico for drivers seeking sophistication and performance.
news.summary: The 2025 Mazda CX-5 is now available for drivers in Rio Grande, Puerto Rico, offering sophistication, performance, and advanced technology at Flagship Mazda. Released on December 2, 2024, this versatile and reliable SUV provides a sought-after option for customers. Featuring cutting-edge technology, the 2025 Mazda CX-5 promises a new level of driving experience.

news.headline: Ketamine Healing Clinic in LA now offers FDA-approved TMS therapy for mental health conditions, including depression, anxiety, PTSD, and chronic pain.
news.summary: A clinic specializing in Ketamine therapy in Los Angeles has introduced FDA-approved Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) therapy. TMS is a non-invasive and drug-free solution for mental health issues like depression, anxiety, PTSD, and chronic pain. Patients can now access this treatment at the clinic to achieve better results.

news.headline: BOSS.Tech launches 25 Days of Business Building Inspiration with daily tools, tips, and strategies ahead SuperApp launch.
news.summary: In anticipation of the upcoming holiday season, on December 2, 2024, in Philadelphia, the innovative Business Operating System SuperApp known as BOSS.Tech is offering entrepreneurs a special gift to celebrate entrepreneurship. This holiday gift includes daily access to essential tools, tips, and strategies to aid entrepreneurs in their ventures. This initiative comes ahead of the highly-anticipated launch of the SuperApp.

news.headline: Customers in Caguas, Puerto Rico can now purchase the 2025 Honda HR-V at Flagship Honda, offering reliability and versatility.
news.summary: The 2025 Honda HR-V is now available for customers in Caguas, Puerto Rico at Flagship Honda, offering a reliable and versatile SUV option. The announcement was made on December 2, 2024. The vehicle is anticipated to be a popular choice among SUV enthusiasts in the region.

news.headline: Fairfax Financial Holdings declares quarterly dividends on multiple series of preferred shares. (TSX:FFH, FFH.U).
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited (TSX: FFH and FFH.U) declared quarterly dividends per share on its preferred shares. The dividend amounts were not specified in the provided information.

news.headline: Azincourt Energy grants 2,000,000 RSUs to an officer, aligning compensation and shareholder interests.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Dec. 02, 2024, Azincourt Energy Corp. disclosed the issuance of 2,000,000 restricted share units (RSUs) to an officer of the Company under approved incentive plans. These RSUs will become Common Shares after twelve months from the issuance date, serving to link management compensation to shareholder interests. Azincourt is listed as (TSX.V: AAZ, OTC: AZURF).

news.headline: Rockridge Resources announces filing of circular for annual general meeting to approve merger with Eros and MAS Gold.
news.summary: Vancouver, BC, December 02, 2024 - In recent news, Rockridge Resources Ltd. (TSX-V: ROCK) (OTCQB: RRRLF) (Frankfurt: RR0) has officially initiated the distribution of the joint management information circular, along with associated documents, for the annual general and special meeting with shareholders. The circular, dated November 26, 2024, encompasses the proposed three-way merger involving Rockridge, Eros Resources Corp., and MAS Gold Corp. Through this transaction, Eros is set to acquire all outstanding shares of Rockridge via a plan of arrangement under the Business Corporations Act (B.C.), as well as all remaining shares of MAS Gold. This development marks a significant step in the consolidation and growth plans for the companies involved.

news.headline: Bombardier settles 2016 lawsuit against Honeywell, details remain confidential.
news.summary: Bombardier Inc. announced on December 02, 2024, that a settlement has been reached in its 2016 lawsuit against Honeywell International Inc. The lawsuit, filed in the Superior Court of Québec, has been resolved, including the pending appeal before the Supreme Court of Canada. The specifics of the settlement agreement remain confidential between Bombardier and Honeywell.

news.headline: Lotus Technology reports vehicle delivery results for first 11 months of 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Lotus Technology Inc., a prominent global provider of intelligent and luxury mobility solutions, revealed its vehicle delivery performance for the initial eleven months of 2024.

news.headline: New America High Income Fund (HYB) to distribute $.04 per share on Dec. 31, 2024 to common shareholders of record by Dec. 17.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Boston, the New America High Income Fund, Inc. disclosed its plan to issue a distribution of $.04 per share on its common stock with the payment scheduled for December 31, 2024. This distribution will be directed to common shareholders recorded by December 17, 2024. The ex-dividend date for this distribution is also December 17th. The Fund identified as NYSE: HYB will be orchestrating this payment and distribution process.

news.headline: Fountain Asset Corp. settles $127,500 debt by issuing 2.55M shares valued at $0.05/share to CEO Parks; approved by shareholders. Hold period till March 30, 2025.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 2, 2024, Fountain Asset Corp. (TSXV: FA) announced the successful closure of a debt settlement totaling $127,500 by issuing 2,550,000 subordinate voting shares at a price of $0.05 per share. This settlement was in relation to debt owed to Andrew Parks for his role as the Chief Executive Officer. Shareholders of the company approved the debt settlement during a special meeting held on October 30, 2024. The shares issued are subject to a statutory hold period that will conclude on March 30, 2025.
